methodology.pubmed_baseline: Empty set; PubMed query uses mindate >= snapshot_date + 1, so every hit is post-freeze by construction.
methodology.pubmed_match_criteria: PubMed esearch with term: (drug[tiab]) AND (outcome[tiab]) AND (therapeutic OR treatment OR therapy OR clinical trial)[tiab].
methodology.ct_baseline: Computed retrospectively from clinical_trials_cache (populated 2026-05-12 evening) using last_update_date <= snapshot_date. PubMed baseline frozen at 2026-05-12; CT.gov baseline reconstructed post-hoc.
methodology.ct_match_criteria: Case-insensitive equality on drug + outcome between snapshot hypothesis and clinical_trials_cache row. Delta = cache NCTs with last_update_date > snapshot_date and nct_id not in baseline.

status_transitions.pending: 0 new PMIDs and 0 new trials since freeze
status_transitions.partial_support: 1-2 new PMIDs OR any new trial registered
status_transitions.strong_support: 3+ new PMIDs OR phase-2+ trial registered
